pool_name: Every fight win = skill-verified server-side -> d6 roll draws ONE of the 6 shared pools (even ~1-in-6) -> that pool pays 1% of its live stock. Same seed cannot be re-rolled. LIVE on seas-server 2026-07-01.

Most pools drop TRADE GOODS (food + materials), NOT coin. Coin comes from TRADING those goods at markets (travel + time + risk = the trade game). Only a few pools (bilge/goblin) carry a little copper directly. Low fights always drop FOOD to feed the pawn + a little extra.
